rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH R. JANSSENS VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Keenan Properties, Inc.'S Demurrer To Complaint (Pursuant To A Challenge To Judge Kahn)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 5, 2011, line 10, Defendant Keenan Properties, Inc.'s Demurrer To Complaint (Pursuant To A Challenge To Judge Kahn). DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICITY EACH PRODUCT THAT CAUSED INJURY AND CAUSATION PER BOCKRATH V. ALDRICH CHEMICAL (1999) 21 CAL.4TH 71. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC., DBA GREAT VS. SFRIP, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion Requesting Direction From The Court Appointment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 5, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC., DBA GREAT, MOTION REQUESTING DIRECTION FROM THE COURT APPOINTMENT. PLAINTIFF MAY RETAIN FUNDS PAID BY DEFENDANT AND FILE THE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. THE RECEIVER IS DIRECTED TO FILE REQUEST FOR DISCHARGE, A FINAL ACCOUNTING AND APPLICATION FOR FEE. FURTHERMORE DEFENDANTS MUST PAY THE RECEIVER'S FEE AS A CONDITION OF REINSTATEMENT OF THE LIQUOR LICENSE. RECEIVER'S MOTION TO APPROVE THE SALE OF THE LIQUOR LICENSE IS DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW DIMITRIOU VS. CIT FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 5, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANT CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED BASED UPON THE COURT'S RULING ON THE DEMURRER. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW DIMITRIOU VS. CIT FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 5, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANT CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE UCL CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE AN INJURY IN FACT BECAUSE OF THE BUSINESS PRACTICE. SEE MADRID V. PEROT SYSTEMS CORP., (2005) 130 CAL.APP.4TH 440. THE DEMURRER IS ALSO SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENT AND INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT AND CANNOT PLEAD RELIANCE. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: NAVISTAR, INC. VS. CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD, AN AGENCY OF THE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 5, 2011, line 7, INTERVENOR CUMMINS INC., DAIMLER TRUCKS NORTH AMERICA, LLC, DETROIT DIESEL CORPORATION, MACK TRUCKS, INC., VOLVO GROUP NORTH AMERICA, LLC Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention. Cummin, Inc., Daimler Trucks North America, LLC, Detroit Diesel Corp., Mack Trucks, Inc., and Volvo Group North America, LLC¿s Motion to Intervene is granted Per CCP §387(a) and (b). Intervenors have met their burden. They have shown that they have a direct interest in the issues presented in this case, particularly as to questions of statutory and regulatory interpretation which have a direct effect on certification testing procedures that Intervenors will be subject to in the future. Moreover, CARB, as the Regulating Agency and Plaintiff, as a competitor of Intervenors are not appropriate parties to represent Intervenors¿ interests in this case. Timely application has been made and intervention will not enlarge the issues in this case. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: NAVISTAR, INC. VS. CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD, AN AGENCY OF THE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Memorandum Of Putative Intervenors In Support Of Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 5, 2011, line 7, PLAINTIFF NAVISTAR, INC. Motion To Strike Memorandum Of Putative Intervenors In Support Of Demurrer To Complaint. Plaintiff¿s Motion to Strike Intervenors¿ Memorandum in Support of Defendant¿s Demurrer is denied. However, Plaintiffs may file a Reply to Intervenors¿ Memorandum by May 16, 2011. =(302/LMG)
